questions.question: What does the learning rate control in gradient descent?
questions.questionZh: 在梯度下降（Gradient Descent）中，学习率（Learning Rate）控制的是什么？
options: The number of features used by the model
How many epochs the model trains for
The size of each parameter update step
The ratio of training to test data
optionsZh: 模型 (model) 使用的特征 (feature) 数量
模型训练的轮数（Epoch）
每次参数更新的步长
训练数据 (training data) 与测试数据 (test data) 的比例
questions.explanation: The learning rate is a scalar that controls how much weights change per gradient descent step. Too large causes divergence, too small causes slow convergence.
questions.explanationZh: 学习率（Learning Rate）是一个标量（Scalar），用于控制每次梯度下降（Gradient Descent）迭代中权重（Weights）的更新幅度。该值过大会导致发散（Divergence），过小则会导致收敛（Convergence）缓慢。

questions.question: What does R-squared = 0 mean for a regression model?
questions.questionZh: 对于回归模型（regression model）而言，决定系数（R-squared）= 0 意味着什么？
options: The model makes perfect predictions
The model is no better than always predicting the mean of the target
The model has negative error
The model has not been trained yet
optionsZh: 该模型 (model) 能够做出完美预测 (predictions)
该模型（model）的性能并不优于始终预测目标变量（target）均值（mean）的基准。
该模型存在负误差 (negative error)。
模型 (Model) 尚未进行训练 (Training)。
questions.explanation: R-squared = 0 means the model explains none of the variance in the target. It performs exactly as well as simply predicting the mean every time.
questions.explanationZh: 决定系数（R-squared）= 0 表示该模型无法解释目标变量（target）中的任何方差（variance）。其表现与每次都简单地预测均值完全相同。

questions.question: Why is feature scaling important for gradient descent in multiple linear regression?
questions.questionZh: 为什么在多元线性回归（Multiple Linear Regression）中，特征缩放（Feature Scaling）对梯度下降（Gradient Descent）非常重要？
options: It makes the model more interpretable
It prevents the cost surface from being elongated, allowing faster convergence
It reduces the number of features needed
It guarantees the model will find the global minimum
optionsZh: 这使得模型更具可解释性（Interpretability）
它能防止代价曲面（cost surface）变得狭长，从而加快收敛速度。
它减少了所需特征（features）的数量。
这保证了模型能够找到全局最小值 (global minimum)。
questions.explanation: When features have very different scales, the cost surface becomes elongated. Gradient descent takes many more steps to converge. Standardizing features makes the surface more spherical.
questions.explanationZh: 当特征（Features）的尺度（Scales）差异较大时，代价曲面（Cost Surface）会变得狭长。梯度下降（Gradient Descent）需要更多的迭代步数才能收敛（Converge）。对特征进行标准化（Feature Standardization）处理，可使该曲面更接近球形。

questions.question: The normal equation gives optimal weights directly. Why would you prefer gradient descent instead?
questions.questionZh: 正规方程（Normal Equation）可以直接求出最优权重。既然如此，为什么还要选择梯度下降（Gradient Descent）呢？
options: Gradient descent always gives more accurate results
The normal equation does not work for linear regression
Matrix inversion in the normal equation is O(n^3) in features, which is too slow for thousands of features
Gradient descent requires less memory than storing the data
optionsZh: 梯度下降（Gradient Descent）始终能得出更准确的结果。
正规方程 (Normal Equation) 不适用于线性回归 (Linear Regression)。
正规方程（Normal Equation）中的矩阵求逆（Matrix Inversion）在特征数量上的时间复杂度为 O(n^3)，当特征数量达到数千时，计算速度会过慢。
与存储数据相比，梯度下降（Gradient Descent）所需的内存更少。
questions.explanation: The normal equation requires inverting X^T * X, which is O(n^3) in the number of features. For large feature counts, gradient descent is more efficient.
questions.explanationZh: 正规方程（Normal Equation）需要对 X^T * X 进行求逆运算，其计算复杂度随特征（Features）数量呈 O(n^3) 增长。当特征数量较大时，梯度下降（Gradient Descent）更为高效。

questions.question: A degree-10 polynomial regression model fits training data perfectly (R^2 = 1.0) but has R^2 = 0.3 on test data. What should you do?
questions.questionZh: 10次多项式回归模型 (10th-degree Polynomial Regression Model) 在训练数据 (Training Data) 上完美拟合（R² = 1.0），但在测试数据 (Test Data) 上的 R² 仅为 0.3。你应该怎么做？
options: Increase the polynomial degree to 20 for even better training fit
Reduce model complexity (lower degree) or add regularization (Ridge) to prevent overfitting
Collect less training data so the model cannot memorize
Remove the test set and report training R^2 only
optionsZh: 将多项式次数（polynomial degree）提高至 20，以获得更优的训练拟合效果（training fit）。
降低模型复杂度（Model Complexity）（降低阶数）或添加正则化（Regularization）（Ridge）以防止过拟合（Overfitting）。
减少训练数据量，使模型无法死记硬背（memorize）。
移除测试集 (Test Set)，仅报告训练集 R² (R-squared)。
questions.explanation: Perfect training fit with poor test fit is overfitting. The fix is to reduce complexity (lower polynomial degree) or add regularization to penalize large weights.
questions.explanationZh: 在训练集上拟合完美但在测试集上表现不佳的现象称为过拟合 (Overfitting)。解决方法是降低模型复杂度（例如降低多项式阶数 (Polynomial Degree)），或添加正则化 (Regularization) 以对较大的权重 (Weights) 施加惩罚。
